title: Lesson 399: 被る, 被る, 我慢...

items.gloss: to put on (one's head); to wear; to have on; to pull over (one's head); to crown (oneself); to be covered with (dust, snow, etc.); to pour (water, etc.) on oneself; to dash on oneself; to ship water; to bear (e.g. someone's debts, faults, etc.); to take (blame); to assume (responsibility); to shoulder (burden); to overlap (e.g. sound or color); to be similar; to be redundant; to be fogged (due to overexposure, etc.); to close; to come to an end; to get a full house; to sell out; to blunder; to bungle; to fail; to be deceived
to suffer; to receive (kindness, rebuke, support); to sustain (damage)
endurance; patience; perseverance; bearing (with something); self-control; self-restraint
god; deity; divinity; spirit; kami; incredible; fantastic; amazing; Emperor (of Japan); thunder
spirit; psyche; god; deity; divinity; kami
